content: agent1: implementing batch_size param for multiple=True options. Will touch src/click/core.py (Option class, process_value/type_cast_value, to_info_dict) and src/click/types.py (maybe convert logic). Will try to keep changes localized and message before big edits.

agent1: done. Added Option(batch_size=...) in src/click/core.py (validation: ValueError if negative, TypeError if used without multiple=True; new type_cast_value override chunks converted values via new helper types._batch; batch_size added to Option.to_info_dict). Added _batch() helper to src/click/types.py. No test files modified. patch.txt written.
